appearance.description: A beautiful, elegant, and deliberately disarming shapechanger whose body is never fixed. She can appear harmless, wounded, noble, monstrous, or perfectly ordinary, then unravel into claws, tendrils, wings, mouths, and impossible flesh.

personality: Elegant manipulator. Cruel, theatrical, adaptive, and socially predatory. She prefers control, humiliation, injury, and fear over killing outright.
backstory: Capella is written as a D&D boss adaptation of a near-unkillable shapechanger: an aberrant lich-like creature with a soul anchor, monstrous regeneration, Far Realm mutation, and self-only flesh polymorph.
notes: Core player-facing deception rule: against player characters, Deception / Impersonation / Persuasion uses only Charisma. No Expert Deceiver. No Silver Tongue. Prepared Deception cannot apply to members of the player party. Every form change prompts a fresh Insight or Investigation contest. Boss Presence is the temporary enemy-boss layer; remove it if tamed, purified, weakened, or recruited.

spells.name: Flesh Polymorph
spells.description: Modified self-only Polymorph. Does not replace HP, AC, mental stats, or the sheet. Adds physical traits only. Usually keep up to 3 major traits active at once.

spells.name: Voice of Distortion
spells.description: One creature that can hear Capella makes a DC 25 WIS save. On failure choose one: lose reaction, disadvantage on next attack, cannot willingly move closer, or subtract 1d6 from next saving throw or ability check.

spells.name: Dominate Monster
spells.description: Used as an aberrant lich-style high-tier psychic power. DM may reflavor as invasive flesh/voice control.

spells.name: Plane Shift
spells.description: Escape or story movement option. Usually used to leave or reposition rather than hard-delete players.

spells.name: Detect Thoughts
spells.description: Used to tailor lies, impersonation, and social manipulation.

spells.name: Suggestion
spells.description: Social pressure option for manipulation scenes.

abilities.name: Roll Calculator — Boss Saves
abilities.description: STR Save: Advantage 1d20+7. DEX Save: Advantage 1d20+9. CON Save: Advantage 1d20+10. INT Save: Advantage 1d20+8. WIS Save: Advantage 1d20+9. CHA Save: Advantage 1d20+15.

abilities.name: Roll Calculator — Social / Casting
abilities.description: Spell Save DC: 25. Spellcasting / Flesh Attack: Advantage 1d20+17. Proficient Charisma Skill: Advantage 1d20+15. Prepared Deception / Impersonation / Persuasion: 1d20+15; Silver Tongue d20 floor 10 applies. Player Improv Deception / Impersonation / Persuasion: 1d20+10; Expert Deceiver and Silver Tongue do not apply vs players.

abilities.name: Advantage on All Rolls
abilities.description: While Boss Presence is active, Capella rolls 2d20 and takes the higher result on attacks, saves, checks, and contested rolls unless a line says otherwise.

abilities.name: Charisma Spellcasting
abilities.description: Capella uses Charisma for spell save DCs, spell attacks, flesh magic, Polymorph effects, and distortion effects.

abilities.name: Expert Deceiver
abilities.description: Umbrella social mastery package. Grants prepared Deception / Impersonation / Persuasion a +10 expertise-style bonus. Does not apply against player characters.

abilities.name: Silver Tongue
abilities.description: College of Eloquence-style feature. For Deception and Persuasion, d20 rolls of 9 or lower count as 10. This is a d20 floor of 10. Does not apply against player character Insight checks.

abilities.name: Arcane Mastery
abilities.description: Adds +2 to spell save DCs and spell/flesh attack rolls.

abilities.name: Unnatural Armor
abilities.description: Base AC becomes 15 + Dexterity modifier while unarmored. With Boss DEX 18, this gives AC 19. Armored Flesh can raise this to AC 21.

abilities.name: Aberrant Lich Bonus
abilities.description: Adds +2 CHA and supports lich-style undead/Far Realm traits such as Soul Vessel, Far Realm Mutation, Unnatural Armor, Arcane Mastery, and Telepathy.

abilities.name: Far Realm Mutation
abilities.description: Explains psychic/cold/necrotic/acid resistance, poison/lightning/nonmagical weapon immunity, unstable biology, and body horror transformations.

abilities.name: Soul Vessel / Far Realm Parasite
abilities.description: When reduced to 0 HP, the current body collapses. Capella does not truly die unless the parasite/vessel anchor is found, contained, destroyed, or otherwise dealt with.

abilities.name: Extra Attack
abilities.description: When Capella takes the Attack action, she makes 2 attacks.

abilities.name: Bonus Attack
abilities.description: If Capella takes the Attack action on her turn, she may make 1 additional natural attack as a Bonus Action.

abilities.name: Legendary Action
abilities.description: Once per round, outside her turn, Capella may take 1 full Action. If used for Attack, this gives her 2 more attacks.

abilities.name: Nonlethal Intent
abilities.description: Capella usually avoids killing. Her attacks are meant to disable, maim, pin, terrify, transform, or humiliate rather than execute.

dnd.subclass: College of Eloquence / Eldritch Lich Traits

feats.name: Actor Feat
feats.description: +1 CHA. Supports mimicry, false identities, and impersonation flavor without adding another flat bonus to player-facing deception.

feats.name: Skill Expert
feats.description: +1 CHA. Folded into Expert Deceiver for prepared deception/impersonation/persuasion.

feats.name: Beguiling Influence
feats.description: Folded into Expert Deceiver. Grants proficiency in Deception and Persuasion.

feats.name: Silver Tongue
feats.description: For Deception/Persuasion outside player-facing checks, d20 rolls of 9 or lower count as 10.

conditionImmunities: Charmed unless she chooses to play along
Frightened unless she chooses to play along

weaknesses.description: Radiant damage disables regeneration for 1 round.
Critical hits disable regeneration for 1 round.
Soul Vessel / Far Realm Parasite must be found or dealt with to truly kill her.

attacks.name: Tendril Lash
attacks.onHit: DC 20 STR save or choose one: pulled 10 ft, knocked prone, or grappled.

attacks.name: Piercing Flesh Spike
attacks.reach: 30/90 ft if fired; 10 ft if grown from body

attacks.name: Bite / Devouring Mouth
attacks.onHit: If target is already grappled by Capella, add +1d8 necrotic.
attacks.description: Maw attack unlocked or improved by Bestial Maw.

attacks.name: False Mercy Touch
attacks.onHit: DC 25 WIS save or target has disadvantage on its next attack roll, ability check, or saving throw before end of its next turn.

attacks.name: Beautiful Monster's Grasp
attacks.onHit: DC 20 STR or DEX save, target's choice, or grappled. Escape DC 20.

polymorphTraits.name: Elongated Limbs
polymorphTraits.description: Melee reach +5 ft. Tendril Lash can reach 20 ft.

polymorphTraits.name: Armored Flesh
polymorphTraits.description: Gain +2 AC until start of her next turn.

polymorphTraits.name: Fluid Body
polymorphTraits.description: May attempt immediate escape from grapple or restraint.

polymorphTraits.name: Bestial Maw
polymorphTraits.description: Bite becomes available. If already available, Bite gains +1d8 necrotic once per turn.

polymorphTraits.name: False Innocent Body
polymorphTraits.description: Appears harmless, wounded, noble, childlike, or socially disarming.

polymorphTraits.name: Horrid Beauty
polymorphTraits.description: Chosen creatures within 15 ft make DC 25 WIS save or lose reactions until start of their next turn. Once per round max.

polymorphTraits.name: Spider Body
polymorphTraits.description: Gain 30 ft climb speed and can climb difficult surfaces.

polymorphTraits.name: Burrowing Flesh
polymorphTraits.description: Gain 20 ft burrow speed through soft matter.

polymorphTraits.name: Aquatic Shape
polymorphTraits.description: Gain 30 ft swim speed and water breathing.

polymorphTraits.name: Mimic Anatomy
polymorphTraits.description: Makes impersonation physically convincing. Each form change prompts a new Insight or Investigation contest.

boss.deathRule: When Capella drops to 0 HP, her current body collapses, laughs, speaks through the corpse, or melts away. The encounter ends unless the party can track or attack the Soul Vessel / Far Realm Parasite. Optional mid-fight reform: after 1 full round, reform 60 ft away with 105 HP.
boss.tamedRule: If Capella is tamed, pacified, recruited, purified, weakened, or otherwise removed from boss status, remove Boss Presence bonuses and use default/tamed stats and HP.
